title: tocoyena formosa
intro: Tocoyena formosa, also known as the Formosa tree or Gold Medal tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tocoyena formosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe sore throats. Tocoyena formosa can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
